blocked_controls.reason: Future cockpit specs must not create order-entry controls.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No buy control may be present for any role.

blocked_controls.reason: Future cockpit specs must not create order-entry controls.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No sell control may be present for any role.

blocked_controls.reason: Order cancellation is outside the read-only cockpit boundary.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No cancel order control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Order modification is outside the read-only cockpit boundary.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No modify order control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Trading automation and manual execution triggers are prohibited.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No execution trigger may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Bot control is prohibited.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No bot start control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Bot control is prohibited.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No bot stop control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: ZEC grid reopening is prohibited by current rules and no bot control may exist.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No grid reopen control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Broker API connection is explicitly outside Phase 6.4.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No broker connector control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Binance API connection is explicitly outside Phase 6.4.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No Binance connector control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: External market-data connectors are prohibited.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No external data connector control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Live market data refresh is prohibited.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No live price refresh control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Checkpoint promotion must not be a UI action.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No checkpoint promotion control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Runtime records are immutable audit artifacts in this boundary.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No runtime mutation control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Warnings must remain visible.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No warning suppression control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Data-quality flags must remain visible.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No data-quality hiding control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Sensitive values require permission and masking enforcement, not ad hoc reveal controls.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No reveal-sensitive-value control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Never-expose fields must be rejected before render.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No never-expose reveal control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Customer-facing sensitive export is blocked.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No sensitive customer-facing export control may be present.

blocked_controls.reason: Customer-facing view requires future governance approval and implementation work.
blocked_controls.validation_rule: No customer-facing enablement control may be present.
